title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: We have to make sure it's just right, not too cold, not too hot. Meanwhile, I'm going to go get his towel and washcloth.

title: will / shall
examples: My nephew Wes is the cutest baby ever. In this series, my sister will show her daily routine with Wes.
Tonight is bath night, so we will get our sink tub. We put it in and we like to use a scrubber for his scalp to help get the shampoo in.

title: can / could / be able to
examples: Wanna teach your kids English? Here's the best way. I don't have a child, but I do have a baby nephew and my sister Amanda said that she'd be more than happy to teach you English expressions that you can use with your child.
Since Wes is just starting to learn English too, maybe you can learn together.
We pour just a tad. As you can hear, he's getting a little fuzzy waiting for his bath. We add the soap and then we add a little bit of water to make it fuzzy.

title: have to / must
examples: We have to make sure it's just right, not too cold, not too hot. Meanwhile, I'm going to go get his towel and washcloth.

title: would (habit/conditional)
examples: Wanna teach your kids English? Here's the best way. I don't have a child, but I do have a baby nephew and my sister Amanda said that she'd be more than happy to teach you English expressions that you can use with your child.
